title: Run full experiment and verify
description: Execute the full feature activation experiment end-to-end. Confirm all agents participated (check roster/roster persistence), all 5 architecture layers were exercised, all 4 permission stages triggered, observability signals were emitted throughout, and state was persisted. Cross-reference results from Tasks 1–4. Acceptance: a consolidated experiment report with per-mechanism pass/fail and agent participation matrix. Size: L.
